payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a vertical rectangular raised center panel and simple molded frame; surface appears matte with light scuffs, and the door is partially edge-cropped in this narrow vertical crop (approx. 0.8 m from camera).
